_comment: Vault-local user preferences learned over time. Lives at <vault>/.mvkit/learned_preferences.json (NOT committed). Skills READ this file at start to adapt their behavior per user. Skills themselves never modify it — only memory-refresh writes here (with user confirmation) when it learns something from input or error during a run. Format intentionally human-readable so the user can edit by hand any time.
_design: Three sections: source_overrides (per-source tweaks beyond connected_sources.json), filter_rules (cross-source skips + keeps the user has stated explicitly), and observations (running list of things refresh noticed that the user may want to act on). All optional; missing keys fall back to skill defaults.

source_overrides._doc: Per-source preferences that aren't quite config (those live in connected_sources.json) but should persist across refreshes. Examples below; the actual list grows as the user gives feedback during refresh runs.

filter_rules._doc: Cross-source rules the user has stated. The skills read these and apply globally.

observations._doc: Things memory-refresh noticed during runs that the user might want to act on. Append-only; the user reviews + acts + clears entries manually. Skills only read for awareness, never auto-action.

_example.observation: github_prs ingested 47 dependabot PRs this run; user might want to add dependabot to skip_authors
